$meta.spec_source: SPEC-100 §7 (risk_indicators), C-SSRS linguistic items, NIKKO GLOSSARY crisis expressions
$meta.description: Canonical crisis phrase database for the semantic safety pre-filter (retrieval/semantic_safety_filter.py). v1.1: expanded with internet slang, informal registers, paraphrases, and indirect expressions identified as gaps during evaluation/test_semantic_filter.py validation run 2026-05-29. Hard threshold lowered from 0.90 to 0.82 in semantic_safety_filter.py to account for paraphrase similarity ceiling of MiniLM-L6-v2.
